aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and local SEO optimizations.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and improve local SEO.
Update website content to include more detailed service descriptions and target local keywords.
Optimize meta tags and headings with relevant keywords for better search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has JSON-LD and Microdata schema types implemented.
gbp_analysis.summary: While schema markup is present, it may not be fully optimized for Google Business Profile (GBP) and lacks integration with local SEO efforts.
critical_issues: No Google reviews, which significantly impacts local search visibility.
Missing integration between website and GBP for consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) information.
Lack of detailed service area information in schema markup.

nap_citations.summary: The website has consistent NAP information but lacks citations across major local directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile with accurate NAP information.
List the business on major local directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local Chamber of Commerce websites.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and citations.

schema_gaps: ServiceArea schema is missing, which is crucial for HVAC businesses serving specific areas.
Review schema is not implemented, limiting the ability to display customer testimonials in search results.
LocalBusiness schema could be more detailed, including attributes like opening hours and payment methods.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and local SEO optimizations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Las Vegas and Henderson.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing local SEO elements.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Building local partnerships and sponsorships to increase local authority and visibility.

page_title: Home - HVAC Services Contractor Las Vegas - Action Air
